skill1.kitLine: When attacked while not in Healthy Body: Invulnerable 3 sec (5x/battle)
skill1.note: Defensive (invuln); emits no damage/heal event, inert for DPS

skill1.kitLine: When attacked: debuff immunity to ∞ debuffs for 3 sec (5x/battle)
Healthy Body: Incoming healing ▲10.26% for 20 sec
skill1.note: Defensive received-heal amp; emits no heal event, no cross-unit consumer wiring

skill1.kitLine: On Full Charge attack vs stage target — Firepower Explosion: 437.98% final ATK additional damage
skill1.note: Modeled on every shotFired (she is a charge RL). Note ruling: full majors — helm/anis on-hit proc class, NOT Q1-exempt

skill1.kitLine: Super Firepower status additional: 262.79% final ATK additional damage
skill1.where: skill1[1] (burstCast, everyN 3 / everyNOffset 1 → self, buff extraHitDamagePct 262.79 / 10s)
skill1.note: Super window fires on her burst casts 1,4,7. Modeled crit-OFF via extraHitDamagePct (finding F1) vs base crit-ON

skill2.note: Gauge bookkeeping — steady-state ABSORBED into skill1[1] everyN 3 / everyNOffset 1 (start at 100 → Super on casts 1,4,7); video-verified Run B

skill2.kitLine: Normal attack during Firepower Charge: +2 Firepower Gauge
skill2.note: Gauge bookkeeping — ABSORBED into everyN 3 alternation

skill2.kitLine: When Firepower Charge ends: +45 Firepower Gauge
skill2.note: Gauge bookkeeping — ABSORBED into everyN 3 alternation

skill2.kitLine: When Full Burst ends (gauge active): Burst Gauge filling speed ▲5% x Firepower Gauge charge for 5 sec
skill2.note: Burst-generation only; video shows it does not consume the Firepower cycle (every-3rd-Super held)

skill2.kitLine: Entering Full Burst — Maximum Firepower: ATK ▲80.04% for 10 sec
Maximum Firepower Super-only: ATK ▲35.05% for 10 sec
skill2.note: Cross-slot consolidation: S2 Super rider encoded in the skill1 Super block, not the skill2 array

burst.kitLine: Gauge < 100: Firepower Charge — charges gauge for 10 sec (unremovable), +1 gauge
burst.note: Gauge bookkeeping — ABSORBED into everyN 3 alternation

burst.kitLine: Gauge = 100: Super Firepower — Attack Damage ▲45.03% for 10 sec
burst.note: Cross-slot consolidation: burst Super rider encoded in the skill1 Super block

burst.kitLine: Gauge = 100: decreases Firepower Gauge charge by 100 (drain)
burst.note: Gauge bookkeeping — ABSORBED into everyN 3 alternation
Inert — single partless boss, no AoE surface

documentedConfounds.text: F1: Super +262.79 rider modeled crit-OFF (extraHitDamagePct) vs base crit-ON — a ~7% cold offset that partially offsets the 1.040 HOT; backfilled
documentedConfounds.why: Deliberate tuning lever. If the rider should actually be crit-ON, the sim is currently under-counting the Super hit (cold pull); removing the offset would push the already-HOT 1.083 ratio higher

documentedConfounds.text: Entire Firepower-Gauge cycle (start +100, +2/attack, +45 on end, <100 charge, =100 drain) collapsed into skill1[1] everyN 3 / everyNOffset 1 — Super on casts 1,4,7
documentedConfounds.why: Core approximation but video-verified cast-by-cast (Run B, every-3rd-Super confirmed). Known-not-a-surprise; the 10s Super window => ~8% of full-charge shots

documentedConfounds.text: Base 437.98% Firepower Explosion ruled full-majors (helm/anis on-hit proc class, NOT Q1-exempt)
documentedConfounds.why: Settled ruling on how the base hit scales; if the proc-class classification were wrong the base hit magnitude would shift, but it is documented as a deliberate decision

documentedConfounds.text: S2 Full-Burst-end burst-gauge fill (+5% x gauge, 5s) skipped as burst-generation only
documentedConfounds.why: Rotation-minor; video confirms it does not consume the Firepower cycle. In principle faster bursts could add damage (HOT direction) but documented as verified-negligible

documentedConfounds.text: S1 invuln/debuff-immunity/Healthy-Body heal and burst Explosion Radius +200% skipped
documentedConfounds.why: Inert for single-partless-boss DPS; no damage surface, no heal event emitted

documentedConfounds.text: AUTOFIRE exemption from 22f release latency now resolves from datamined input_type='DOWN_Charge' (engine+web); redundant charFixes.noBoltRecovery flag removed 2026-07-17
documentedConfounds.why: Resolved — no current config field; handled at engine level from datamine, corroborates the earlier user test. Not an open gap

authorIntentSummary: The override is a TIER AUDIT REWORK (2026-07-13) that models Super Firepower exactly rather than the old hitCount:12 smear. The whole Firepower-Gauge cycle is collapsed into one skill1 Super-window block (burstCast, everyN 3 / everyNOffset 1) so Super fires on her burst casts 1,4,7; that single block carries all three Super riders — +262.79% extraHitDamagePct (S1), ATK +35.05 (S2), Attack Damage +45.03 (burst). Base kit is the 437.98% Firepower Explosion per full-charge shot (full majors), S2 FB-enter ATK 80.04/10s, and burst unconditional AD 110.21/10s. Key approximation: the 262.79 Super rider is modeled crit-OFF (finding F1) as a deliberate ~7% cold offset against the unit's HOT bias; defensive lines, gauge plumbing, burst-gen smoothing, and explosion radius are documented skips. Board: HOT ▲ 1.083 (n=3, MAD 0.083, range 1.01–1.15). No kit line is silently dropped — every prose line maps to a block or an unmodeled entry.
